Programming questions were easy to medium level.

column6: 1st assessment was gaming where we need basic maths knowledge and should think logically answer fast because there is time alloted for each section(there will be 4 section in total)and 2nd round is the coding assessment where we get programs on arrays,strings,linked list and hash map so it is better to practice leet code to master in coding
column9:
It is better to know what is there is our Resume major questions were asked from the Resume itself and should know about the projects in detail.It was indeed a good experience nothing to worry about interviewers are friendly and no need to get anxious be confident of what you know and even if you don't just tell you don't have any idea about the topic and you are eager to learn about it.
 I remember few questions which they asked me.
 1.Tell me about yourself apart from what u mentioned in Resume
 2.What kind of environment you want in your Working place list any three
 3.There was Scenario based question where me and my colleague are working on same project and he tells his approach is right and you know it is not how will you convince him to agree with you approach.
 4.Water bottle was placed in front of me and interviewer asked me how will you test this bottle and on what basis
 5.They asked me about my Project and problems faced while doing the project 
 6.They asked about the internship which I did and what did I learn from those internships and will it help you in future.
 7.They asked me if u had made any research about the company
 8.They asked me questions related to MySql it included basic queries.
column10: Technical questions asked were very few they asked me about the project and said me to write query on insert,update and delete taking own examples
column11: 1st program was related to array not sure what exactly the question was 2nd program was to find minimum time required to execute a set of processes(process allocation).I used Java to solve the question

column6: It was a game round and it was mid level not too easy or hard this test is called pyrometric test and similar questions were asked in round. It’s important to practice to keep up the speed
